items.title: Strategy seeks another $44.1B to buy more Bitcoin amid market downturn
items.summary: Strategy is increasingly turning to perpetual preferred stocks to fund its Bitcoin strategy, with the company adding 90,000 BTC to its balance sheet so far this year.
items.title_cn: 策略公司寻求额外441亿美元在市场低迷期增持比特币
items.summary_cn: 策略公司正越来越多地转向永久优先股来为其比特币策略融资，该公司今年迄今已在其资产负债表上增加了9万枚比特币。

items.title: Bitcoin’s battle for $70K continues as data shows traders avoiding bullish positioning
items.summary: Rising inflation concerns weigh on Bitcoin’s breakout as traders refuse to take on bullish positions, despite Monday’s 4% price bounce.
items.title_cn: 比特币争夺7万美元关口持续，数据显示交易员避免看涨头寸
items.summary_cn: 通胀担忧上升给比特币的突破带来压力，尽管周一价格反弹4%，交易员仍拒绝建立看涨头寸。

items.title: Bitcoin spot volumes fall to 2023 lows as BTC rallies remain news-led
items.summary: Bitcoin price topped $71,600 at the US market open, but the rally lacked sustained spot volumes. Can the bulls hold BTC above $70,000?
items.title_cn: 比特币现货交易量跌至2023年低点，BTC反弹仍由新闻驱动
items.summary_cn: 比特币价格在美国市场开盘时突破71,600美元，但反弹缺乏持续的现货交易量支撑。多头能否将BTC维持在7万美元上方？

items.title: Traders say Bitcoin still due for ‘next leg lower’ targeting $46K BTC price
items.summary: BTC price action looked weaker after Sunday's weekly close below the 200-week MA, with Bitcoin market participants bracing for lower levels.
items.title_cn: 交易员称比特币仍将迎来'下一轮下跌'，目标位4.6万美元
items.summary_cn: 周日周线收于200周均线下方后，BTC价格走势显得疲软，比特币市场参与者正为更低价格水平做准备。

items.title: Crypto ETF inflows slow to $230M as Fed caution dents momentum: CoinShares
items.summary: Weekly crypto ETP inflows reached $230 million despite $405 million in post-FOMC outflows, as Bitcoin led gains and Ether ended a three-week inflow streak, CoinShares reported.
items.title_cn: 加密ETF流入放缓至2.3亿美元，美联储谨慎态度削弱势头：CoinShares报告
items.summary_cn: 尽管FOMC会议后出现4.05亿美元资金流出，但每周加密ETP流入仍达到2.3亿美元，比特币领涨，而以太坊结束了连续三周的资金流入，CoinShares报告显示。

items.title: Bitmine chair sees ‘mini-crypto winter’ thaw for ETH as it hits 77% of goal
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies bought another $139 million in Ether last week, bringing its ETH holdings to 4.6 million.
items.title_cn: Bitmine董事长认为ETH'迷你加密寒冬'正在解冻，已实现77%目标
items.summary_cn: Bitmine Immersion Technologies上周又购买了1.39亿美元的以太坊，使其ETH持有量达到460万枚。

items.title: Ethereum may see 25% rally as richest ETH whales return to ‘profitable state’
items.summary: ETH could approach $2,750 by June and $3,200 by September if a historical whale-profit signal repeats, though past cycles show mixed outcomes.
items.title_cn: 以太坊可能迎来25%反弹，最富有的ETH鲸鱼重返'盈利状态'
items.summary_cn: 如果历史鲸鱼盈利信号重演，ETH可能在6月前接近2,750美元，9月前接近3,200美元，尽管过去周期显示结果不一。

items.title: Early Ethereum whale rebuilds stack with $19.5M in ETH buys
items.summary: Ethereum whale thomasg.eth has accumulated $19.5 million in ETH this week, as Bitmine’s Tom Lee argues the market may be nearing the end of “crypto winter.”
items.title_cn: 早期以太坊鲸鱼重建持仓，买入1950万美元ETH
items.summary_cn: 以太坊鲸鱼thomasg.eth本周已累计买入1950万美元的ETH，Bitmine的Tom Lee认为市场可能正接近'加密寒冬'的尾声。

items.title: Ether taker volume hits 3-year high: Will ETH avoid a 19% price decline?
items.summary: A strong buy signal not seen since 2022 just flashed on Ether, but the altcoin needs to hold above a key price level to avoid invalidating the pattern.
items.title_cn: 以太坊吃单量创3年新高：ETH能否避免19%的价格下跌？
items.summary_cn: 以太坊刚刚闪现自2022年以来未见的强烈买入信号，但该山寨币需要守住关键价格水平上方，以避免使该模式失效。

items.title: Execution quality is the missing metric in Bitcoin and Ethereum markets
items.summary: Crypto’s hidden trading costs demand the adoption of transaction cost analysis. Slippage, fees and fragmentation erode trust as crypto matures into institutional markets.
items.title_cn: 执行质量是比特币和以太坊市场缺失的指标
items.summary_cn: 加密市场的隐性交易成本要求采用交易成本分析。滑点、费用和碎片化侵蚀信任，因为加密市场正成熟进入机构市场。

items.title: Aave V4 Clears Governance Vote, Eyes Ethereum Mainnet With Security-First Rollout
items.summary: Aave’s community has approved a proposal to deploy Aave V4 on Ethereum mainnet, setting the stage for a tightly controlled launch focused on risk management and long-term scalability. Aave DAO Greenlights V4 Upgrade With New Credit Infrastructure The approved ARFC (Aave Request for Comment) outlines a security-first activation, with conservative parameters and a deliberately limited […]
items.title_cn: Aave V4通过治理投票，着眼于以太坊主网以安全为先的部署
items.summary_cn: Aave社区已批准在以太坊主网上部署Aave V4的提案，为专注于风险管理和长期可扩展性的严格控制启动奠定基础。Aave DAO批准V4升级及新信用基础设施。

items.title: Australian Pension Fund Weighs Crypto Access Amid Market Volatility

items.summary_cn: Hostplus的加密雄心正试图满足日益增长的投资者需求，尽管波动性使竞争对手保持观望。

items.title: Balancer Labs Winds Down Months After $128M DeFi Exploit
items.summary: The restructuring comes as analysts say older DeFi models built on token incentives and emissions are increasingly under pressure.
items.title_cn: Balancer Labs在1.28亿美元DeFi漏洞利用数月后逐步关闭
items.summary_cn: 此次重组之际，分析师表示基于代币激励和排放的旧DeFi模型正面临越来越大的压力。

items.title: Delaware Eyes Stablecoin Leadership With New Licensing Framework
items.summary: Delaware lawmakers introduced Senate Bill 19 on Monday afternoon, aiming to establish one of the nation’s first state-level regulatory regimes for payment stablecoins aligned with federal law. SB19 Requires 1:1 Reserves and Monthly Audits for Stablecoin Firms The proposed Delaware Payment Stablecoin Act or Delaware Banking Modernization Act lays out a licensing and oversight structure […]
items.title_cn: 特拉华州通过新许可框架寻求稳定币领导地位
items.summary_cn: 特拉华州立法者周一下午提出第19号参议院法案，旨在建立全国首批州级支付稳定币监管制度之一，与联邦法律保持一致。SB19要求稳定币公司保持1:1储备并进行月度审计。

items.title: When Crypto Assets Become Investment Contracts, SEC Defines Key Conditions
items.summary: SEC defines when crypto assets become securities while outlining five core categories, tying regulatory treatment to issuer-driven profit expectations and clarifying how different types of digital assets are evaluated under U.S. law. SEC and CFTC Outline Crypto Asset Classification Rules A regulatory shift is redefining how crypto assets are treated under U.S. securities law, as […]
items.title_cn: 当加密资产成为投资合同时，SEC定义关键条件
items.summary_cn: SEC定义了加密资产何时成为证券，同时概述了五个核心类别，将监管待遇与发行人驱动的利润预期挂钩，并澄清了不同类型数字资产在美国法律下的评估方式。SEC和CFTC概述加密资产分类规则。

items.title: Schiff Ponders $11,400 Gold as Prices Slide and 178% Surge Outlook Is Questioned
items.summary: Gold’s sharp pullback amid easing geopolitical tensions masks a deeper macro narrative, as persistent inflation risks, fiscal expansion, and historical patterns fuel expectations of a powerful long-term rally, according to Peter Schiff. $11,400 Gold? Schiff Floats 178% Surge Scenario as Prices Slide Market pressure on gold is increasingly tied to expectations of prolonged inflation and […]

items.summary_cn: 在地缘政治紧张局势缓解背景下黄金的急剧回调掩盖了更深层的宏观叙事，据彼得·席夫称，持续的通胀风险、财政扩张和历史模式助长了强劲长期反弹的预期。

items.title: Japan reports lower-than-expected core inflation for February, headline CPI eases for a fourth month
items.summary: The consumer price index fell to 1.3% last month, its lowest level since March 2022 and below the central bank's 2% target. It was down from 1.5% in January.

items.title: ‘Tax resistance’ gains attention amid ICE protests, Iran war — and IRS penalties could follow
items.summary: Tax protesters often withhold taxes due to moral objections to certain government programs, such as the Iran war. But there can be IRS penalties, experts say.

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: The macro environment is firmly in Risk Off mode. Extreme Fear (11) dominates crypto sentiment, while traditional markets show DXY strengthening (99.41), US10Y yields rising (4.33%), and VIX spiking (26.15) - all classic flight-to-safety signals. Fed expectations remain restrictive (3.67% implied rate), and Japan's weak yen creates intervention risks. Layer 2 narratives are mixed: crypto news shows institutional interest (Australian pension funds) alongside security concerns (Balancer exploit), while macro news focuses on inflation easing and tax resistance. The combination suggests a cautious, defensive market environment where liquidity is contracting.

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: BTC shows neutral technicals (RSI 51.4, ADX 24.9) with slight negative funding (0.000072) and higher short liquidations ($5.95M vs $4.20M long). The Fear & Greed index at Extreme Fear (11) suggests potential oversold conditions, but the macro Risk Off environment limits upside. The 10.2% lower wick indicates some buying support, while 32.6% upper wick shows selling pressure. With OI delta negative (-3.82%) and no volume signals, this is a range-bound market awaiting catalyst.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Whale reality contradicts bullish news narratives. Despite positive ETH news (whales accumulating, potential 25% rally), whale data shows NEGATIVE token net flow (-8.5M ETH) and POSITIVE stablecoin inflow (+1.23M) - classic distribution pattern. Technicals are neutral (RSI 50.5, ADX 25.3), with long liquidations ($5.35M) slightly exceeding shorts ($4.17M). The 8.3% lower wick suggests minimal buying support. News optimism isn't backed by whale accumulation.
* **Key Metric**: Negative token net flow (-8,514,831 ETH) despite bullish news - whales are sending ETH to exchanges, not accumulating.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: Similar to ETH, SOL shows bearish whale reality with negative token flow (-13.6M SOL) and positive stablecoin inflow (+503k). Sentiment score is negative (-0.1) with 54.3% confidence. Technicals show SOL at higher price rank (70/100) with RSI 54.3 and weak ADX (23.1). Short liquidations dominate ($4.09M vs $0.53M long), but 17.9% lower wick and 57.1% upper wick show significant selling pressure at highs. News is generic (same as crypto general) with no SOL-specific catalysts.
* **Key Metric**: High upper wick exhaustion (57.1%) combined with negative token net flow - strong distribution signals.

**Additional Assets**:
* **BNB**: WAIT - Oversold (RSI 38.9) with strong downtrend (ADX 33.4) and low price rank (24.7/100). Minimal wick exhaustion suggests continued pressure.
* **DOGE**: OBSERVE - Neutral technicals (RSI 50.7) with extreme long liquidation dominance ($1.07M short vs $0.54M long). High lower wick (41.6%) shows buying support, but high OI delta (-15.44%) indicates position unwinding.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境明确处于避险模式。加密市场情绪呈现极端恐惧（11），传统市场显示美元走强（99.41）、美债收益率上升（4.33%）、恐慌指数飙升（26.15）——均为典型的避险信号。美联储预期保持限制性（隐含利率3.67%），日元疲软带来干预风险。第二层叙事喜忧参半：加密新闻显示机构兴趣（澳大利亚养老基金）与安全担忧（Balancer漏洞）并存，宏观新闻聚焦通胀缓解和税收阻力。综合表明市场环境谨慎防御，流动性正在收缩。

**🟠 BTC 策略（仅限合约）**:
* **信号**: 试探性建仓
* **现实核查**: BTC技术指标中性（RSI 51.4，ADX 24.9），资金费率微负（0.000072），空头清算高于多头（595万美元 vs 420万美元）。恐惧贪婪指数处于极端恐惧（11）暗示可能超卖，但宏观避险环境限制上行空间。10.2%的下影线显示一定买盘支撑，32.6%的上影线显示卖压。持仓量变化为负（-3.82%）且无成交量信号，市场处于区间震荡等待催化剂。

**🔷 ETH 策略**:
* **信号**: 持续观察
* **现实核查**: 鲸鱼现实与看涨新闻叙事矛盾。尽管ETH新闻积极（鲸鱼积累、潜在25%反弹），鲸鱼数据显示代币净流出为负（-850万ETH）且稳定币净流入为正（+123万美元）——典型的派发模式。技术指标中性（RSI 50.5，ADX 25.3），多头清算（535万美元）略高于空头（417万美元）。8.3%的下影线显示买盘支撑有限。新闻乐观情绪未得到鲸鱼积累支撑。
* **关键指标**: 尽管新闻看涨，代币净流出为负（-8,514,831 ETH）——鲸鱼正在将ETH发送至交易所，而非积累。

**🟣 SOL 策略**:
* **信号**: 暂无交易
* **现实核查**: 与ETH类似，SOL显示看跌的鲸鱼现实，代币净流出为负（-1360万SOL）且稳定币净流入为正（+50.3万美元）。情绪得分为负（-0.1），置信度54.3%。技术指标显示SOL处于较高价格分位（70/100），RSI 54.3，ADX偏弱（23.1）。空头清算主导（409万美元 vs 53万美元多头），但17.9%的下影线和57.1%的上影线显示高位卖压显著。新闻为通用内容（与加密新闻相同），无SOL特定催化剂。
* **关键指标**: 高上影线耗尽（57.1%）结合代币净流出为负——强烈的派发信号。

**其他资产**:
* **BNB**: 暂无交易——超卖（RSI 38.9），下跌趋势强劲（ADX 33.4），价格分位较低（24.7/100）。影线耗尽有限表明压力持续。
* **DOGE**: 持续观察——技术指标中性（RSI 50.7），空头清算显著主导（107万美元 vs 54万美元多头）。高下影线（41.6%）显示买盘支撑，但高持仓量变化（-15.44%）表明头寸平仓。
